word: H729 - אָרַז - ʼâraz - aw-raz' - Made of cedar

sections.paragraph:
Original: ארז

Transliteration: 'âraz

Phonetic: aw-raz'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be firm (verb)
  2. made firm (past participle)
  3. firm, strong (adjective)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 160c

Part(s) of speech:
